message:
fix(core): rewrite binomial_heap internals with collect_roots+consolidate_roots pattern (ft-283h4.46)

The previous merge_root_lists(&self) took an immutable borrow and never
actually linked sibling pointers, causing broken root lists. Replace with
collect_roots() → consolidate_roots() approach that properly manages the
degree table and rebuilds the linked list. Also expand proptest coverage
from 11 to 22 properties including merge commutativity, interleaved
insert/extract, clone preservation, and large heap stress tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
